case_title: WIDMER TED VS GROSSFELD,DOUGHERTY & GROSSFELD et al

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,350.00 FILED BY WIDMER TED AS TO DEFENDANT GROSSFELD,DOUGHERTY & GROSSFELD CLEMENT LESLEY ANN ESQ. DOUGHERTY JOHN A ESQ. GROSSFELD SHELDON ESQ. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-11-1993 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 08
CORRESPONDENCE FROM TED WIDMER OPPOSING THE VENUE CHALLENGE.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CLEMENT LESLEY ANN ESQ.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DOUGHERTY JOHN A ESQ.
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT GROSSFELD SHELDON ESQ.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-11-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO SEP-30-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 05

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WIDMER TED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GROSSFELD,DOUGHERTY & GROSSFELD $2,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $87.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,787.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT GROSSFELD,DOUGHERTY & GROSSFELD CLEMENT LESLEY ANN ESQ. DOUGHERTY JOHN A ESQ. GROSSFELD SHELDON ESQ.
